narrative_constraints.statement: Quay edges must use brick walls with natural stone coping and steps, and incorporate nature-inclusive measures. Green quay banks and flower-rich grassland on embankments are required as design elements.

provenance.quoted_text: Kaderanden baksteen muur, natuursteen deksloof + trappen en natuurinclusieve maatregelen

reasons: Page is from a Beeldkwaliteitplan (image quality plan), which sets design guidance rather than binding rules.
Content is presented as reference imagery with captions, not as explicit prescriptive text.
Nature-inclusive measures and green quay banks are indicated as design intent.

urban_intent_passages: Kaderanden baksteen muur, natuursteen deksloof + trappen en natuurinclusieve maatregelen
